summary: Weather Agent is a chat-first weather assistant that provides current conditions in a polished, card-based interface.
how_it_works: The chat interprets user intent and detects whether a message is about weather or about the application itself.
For weather questions, the assistant uses tool-calling to fetch live weather data from Open-Meteo.
Returned data is formatted into chat text plus structured weather cards in the UI.
capabilities: Card-based weather display with condition, temperature, humidity, wind, and UV index
Temperature unit toggle between Celsius and Fahrenheit
Responsive mobile and desktop chat layouts
Location label enhancement using reverse geocoding when available
limitations: The app currently focuses on current conditions rather than full multi-day forecasts.
Location labels depend on reverse geocoding availability and may fall back to parsed user input.
Some details can vary by region and source coverage.
